behaviors.description: Embedding vector dimensionality matches the vector index dimension for any accepted query string.
behaviors.justification: The real failure is usually a contract drift between deployed embedding model output size and the live vector index schema. In-process mocks can return a hardcoded correct length and miss production mismatches.
behaviors.test_description: Run against the deployed embedding endpoint and real vector DB/index metadata: submit representative queries, assert returned vector length equals the index dimension, and fail on any mismatch.

behaviors.description: Similarity search results are ordered by descending cosine similarity.
behaviors.justification: Ordering correctness depends on real interaction between query vector generation, DB retrieval, and score handling. A pure mock can hide score-order bugs or incorrect sort direction.
behaviors.test_description: Use a local test vector index with seeded vectors and known cosine distances; execute search through the real data-access layer and assert returned scores are monotonically non-increasing and IDs match expected order.

behaviors.description: LLM re-ranking reorders at least some nuanced-query results versus raw similarity rank.
behaviors.justification: This behavior claims semantic ranking quality from a real LLM. Mocked or deterministic stubs would trivially pass and miss true model behavior and variance.
behaviors.test_description: Call the real re-ranking model with a curated nuanced-query fixture set where lexical similarity conflicts with intent; compare raw vs reranked order and require a minimum reorder rate across repeated runs.

behaviors.description: No-close-match queries return an empty set, not low-relevance noise.
behaviors.justification: This is mainly thresholding and retrieval logic across modules plus vector-store scoring. Mocking retrieval can hide threshold wiring or score-scale mistakes.
behaviors.test_description: Seed a local vector DB with domain-specific items, issue out-of-domain queries through the API service layer, and assert zero results when all scores are below the configured relevance threshold.

behaviors.description: Median end-to-end query latency (ingest -> embedding -> retrieval -> rerank -> response) stays under 2 seconds.
behaviors.justification: Latency depends on real network hops and external services (embedding/LLM/vector DB). Local mocks systematically understate latency and can hide production regressions.
behaviors.test_description: Run a production-like load test against a deployed environment with real dependencies; collect end-to-end timings for a representative query mix and assert p50 < 2000 ms.
